title: circaea × mentiens
intro: Circaea × mentiens, also known as the round-leaved enchanter's nightshade, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Circaea × mentiens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to soothe sore muscles and calm the mind.
